channel.title: Fmcg on Nigel Green | Strategic Finance & Business Architecture
channel.description: Recent content in Fmcg on Nigel Green | Strategic Finance & Business Architecture

item.title: POD Market Research — Partner
item.description: Built the UK office of a start-up consultancy. Led conjoint pricing across 7 EU markets and a professional services transformation project.

item.title: TNS / Conversa Global — Director
item.description: 10+ years spanning management consultancy and market research across 80+ countries. Built models for Nigeria’s largest telco, Vietnam’s cement champion, and global wine brands.
